videoSnippet.title: This is How You Face a Giant || Shakhriyar Mamedyarov vs Mukhiddin Madaminov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Mamedyarov, Shakhriyar (2717) - Madaminov, Mukhiddin (2586) 0-1
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.06.11
D38 Queen's Gambit Declined, Ragozin variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Bb4 5.Qa4+ Nc6 6.e3 O-O 7.Qc2 Bd6 8.c5 Be7 9.Bb5 Nb8 10.Rb1 c6 11.Bd3 Nbd7 12.e4 dxe4 13.Nxe4 h6 14.O-O e5 15.Nxe5 Nxe5 16.dxe5 Nxe4 17.Bxe4 Qd4 18.b4 Be6 19.Re1 a5 20.bxa5 Qxc5 21.Rxb7 Qxa5 22.Bd2 Qa3 23.h3 Bc5 24.Bf4 Bd4 25.Qxc6 Qxa2 26.Bg3 Ra3 27.Bf3 Rc3 28.Qe4 Rxf3 29.Qxd4 Rb3 30.Ra7 Qc2 31.Kh2 Rc8 32.Rea1 Rd3 33.Qf4 Rc4 34.R1a2 Qd1 35.Ra1 Qc2 36.R7a2 Qb3 37.Ra3 Qb4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:25 Game Starts!
03:00 CNG (Rb1)
09:00 Pause the video!
10:15 IWITP
11:25 Standings after Round 5
